data.body:
GAP FINDINGS (from implementation plan gap analysis):

1. Also run tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh at T6 to catch regressions in build pipeline (hash determinism, overlay section detection). Add to AC:
   Verify: bash tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh

2. RED marker removal must produce clean .test-index lines with no orphaned brackets. After removal, verify format:
   Verify: grep 'reviewer-delta-deep-hygiene.*test-reviewer-blindspot-annotations' .test-index | grep -v '\[' && echo pass
   (confirms entry exists without any bracket annotations)
